who: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual data entry causes late payroll submissions. We automate data compilation instead of manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
problem: Compiling and formatting employee benefits enrollment data for payroll submission
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for HR managers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try data import from spreadsheets and manual adjustments
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
